textByHashes.1b0812a211bfeea26712c5c58e8bb84789a1c7a8: Gather round, one and all! It's time for the Darkmeyer Auctions!
textByHashes.56c305abd65ab9dc833d5d25d1db37233d294a78: We've got quite the lineup for you today! So, let's get started!
textByHashes.0f1c3b6c4ab3dcfc6fb16007453da3434e258bc3: First up, a 37 year old male from sector four!
textByHashes.a941292ccd9759e8a94e5fe815b81af2a8796f59: He's got plenty of blood in him, and he'll keep your home clean of any mess!
textByHashes.4baaeaea73de1dd577ef88df7340e125580da406: Let's start the bidding at 1,000 coins! Do I have 1,000?
textByHashes.7e05c62a3a677e64ef507e48b09a663991d3f280: 1,000 coins to the vyre at the back! Do I have 2,000?
textByHashes.b9b0c790fd71af0344cf45ae35eee37a1fe862e8: 2,000 for the lady in red! Anyone for 3,000?
textByHashes.d68972d1003ec9ba387dbdbeaf1343739cef4aa1: I have 3,000! But do I have 4,000?
textByHashes.e456d591573c98349a988803e702c4b253903125: Sold to the vyre at the back!
textByHashes.ec438a584843838cdfa66591b5296dcea85742d1: Right then! Next we have a 22 year old female from sector six!
textByHashes.5f7f7a59f23707e267dd96770d265bdba994da74: She's young and filled with optimism! Perfect for those who enjoy a taste of hope!
textByHashes.a59494e449a0fb34abd69161be115d88c8e60a41: We'll start with 5,000 for this one! Do I have any takers!
textByHashes.40ab67f9b9452cf5fd176d8890719f049965c375: 5,000 coins for the lady at the front! How about 6,000?
textByHashes.ecee468b01c8012e6054b0e7867d414963feea9e: 10,000! We have a bid of 10,000! You lot really want this one! Anyone up for 12,000?
textByHashes.0a71426493a64e94f73e7ae3bf809298de1cd57f: Okay, finally we have a 41 year old male from sector three!
textByHashes.7ff48a5413072be37a91a462b1ff5f1b25ba37cd: Careful! This one is feisty! In fact, we've had to put him in a cage!
textByHashes.8deb56d16e4123ecbab8654e4ab79a30e5462771: If you can put him in his place though, you're in for a treat! His blood is the sweetest around!
textByHashes.9c87cc67249d304e25f22050a4b830df5e270bf7: I have 4,000! But do I have 5,000?
textByHashes.7dd5a871c0f10a351207b894c6978aab5ea3cd8c: 5,000 coins to the vyre in red! Do I have 6,000?
textByHashes.be091f3a1f00d061dcf6dcb28750a930d499db03: 6,000 coins! Looks like we have a competition here! Let's take it to 7,000!
textByHashes.9b3c7eca266d25f3862dfb44711c65fc04c5ebda: We're at 7,000! But will it go higher? 8,000 coins?
textByHashes.8ec8d299e8b74b394b3f659465b1f9401e89cc0e: Sold to the vyre in red!
textByHashes.5721298fc4c7b98b02482ec84d287045168e70a5: Well there you have it! That's all for now from the Darkmeyer Auctions!
textByHashes.1c97f87878fe9263bab5d7ae5a8bffd1366dbef2: Fear not though. We'll be back with more, very soon!
